ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Anthem Biosciences Limited has filed a routine compliance document confirming its adherence to SEBI Regulation 74(5) for the quarter ended June 30, 2026, pertaining to the management of dematerialized and rematerialized securities. The enclosed certificates from their Registrar and Transfer Agent attest to the proper furnishing of all required details to the stock exchanges, indicating robust share registry compliance. There are no red flags or material negative impacts identified; rather, this filing reflects standard good governance.
